markdownRemark.html:
A curated list of awesome Pokémon & Pokémon GO resources, tools and more.

Looking for contributors. Submit a pull request if you have something to add :)
Please check the contribution guidelines for info on formatting and writing pull requests.

Contents

  • Development Projects
    • APIs
    • Apps
    • Bots
    • Miscellaneous
  • Resources & Others
    • Communities
    • Official
    • Maps
    • Tips & Tricks
    • Wiki
    • Others

Development Projects

APIs

  • PokeAPIstars3.1k - A RESTful API for Pokémon (http://pokeapi.co/).
  • pgoapistars1.4k - Pokémon GO API lib/demo.
  • pokemon-APIstars20 - Beginner friendly API endpoint that returns Pokémon Data in JSON format (https://app.pokemon-api.xyz).
  • Pokemon-GO-node-apistars884 - Pokémon GO API Node.js library.
  • Pokemon-Go-Rocket-APIstars376 - Client API library for Pokémon GO in C#.
  • Pokemon GO Java APIstars1.1k - Pokémon GO API for Java.
  • Pokemon Name APIstars445 - Get a list of Pokémon names in JSON.
  • PokemonGO-Pokedexstars119 - Pokédex of Pokémon GO in JSON.
  • PokeTypesstars6 - Get Pokémon types, weaknesses and strengths.
  • TCGdexstars30 - Multi languages Pokémon TCG API.
  • Kotlin-Pokedexstars1.3k - Pokedex app built with Kotlin.
  • graphql-pokemonstars491 - Get information of a Pokémon with GraphQL.

Apps

  • Pokemon-Showdownstars3.8k - Pokémon battle simulator.
  • iPokeMonstars431 - Pokémon like game on iOS with Location Based Service.
  • pokemon-onlinestars278 - Online Pokémon Battle Simulator.
  • Shuffle-Movestars92 - A program to identify and display the best next move for the game Pokémon Shuffle.
  • pokecrystars5 - Guess Pokémon from their cry.
  • Pokedexstars6k - Android Pokedex using Dagger, Hilt, Motion, Coroutines, Flow, and Jetpack.
  • Who's That Pokémon?stars0 - Guess Pokémon from their silhouette.

Bots

  • Pokemon Go Botstars15 - Pokémon GO bot that farms for Pokestops and Pokémon.
  • slack-pokemonstars342 - A bot for having Pokémon battles in Slack.
  • PokeSlackstars40 - Alerts you of nearby Pokémon.
  • TwitchPlaysPokemonstars109 - A bot mimicking Twitch Plays Pokémon.
  • PokemonGo-Botstars3.8k - The Pokémon GO bot script, baking with community.
  • Poketrainerstars123 - A fast and feature filled bot in Python.
  • PokeBotstars16 - The automated Pokémon speedrunning machine.
  • PokemonGoBotstars568 - Bot that plays Pokémon GO.
  • Bot Builder for PokemonGoBotstars17 - Simply build your Pokémon GO bot.
  • PokeBuddystars451 - A Pokémon GO bot.

Miscellaneous

  • alfred-pokedexstars25 - Alfred 3 workflow to lookup information about Pokémon.
  • hyper-pokemonstars1k - Wondrous, tailor-made Pokémon themes for your Hyper terminal.
  • Pokemon-Go-Controllerstars2.5k - Play Pokémon GO safely or at unavailable area.
  • pokecrystalstars1.7k - Disassembly of Pokémon Crystal.
  • x-pokemonstars89 - A web component to display Pokémon.
  • pokeredstars3.2k - Disassembly of Pokémon Red/Blue.
  • pokemon-reverse-engineering-toolsstars293 - Tools for compiling and disassembling Pokémon Red and Pokémon Crystal.
  • pokemon-go-mitm-nodestars478 - Pokémon GO MITM Proxy.
  • PokeMMOstars699 - WebGL Pokémon MMO Engine with Realtime Editor.
  • pogo-optimizerstars508 - Shows you the IVs and information necessary to determine which Pokémon get ground into candy.
  • PoGoToolsstars4 - A set of CLI tools for getting IVs, transferring Pokémon, evolving Pokémon, and trashing items.
  • slack-pokemon-emojistars21 - A tool to upload all the Pokémon to Slack emoji.
  • slack-emoji-pokemonstars364 - A list of Pokémon emojis for Slack.
  • PokemonGO-IV-Renamerstars85 - Automatically renames your Pokémon to their IV stats.
  • pokemongo-genymotionstars19 - Play Pokémon GO from your Genymotion device.
  • pokemongo-game-masterstars39 - Collection of Pokémon GO Game Master versions.
  • Pokemon-Terminalstars4k - Pokémon terminal themes for iTerm2.
  • pokemon-clistars46 - CLI to get Pokémon names.
  • pokespritestars718 - Database of Pokémon sprites from the core series games, including custom shiny versions.
  • PokéPalettesstars1 - 16-bit palettes that represent Pokémon (based on the models from Pokémon GO).

Resources & Others

Communities

  • /r/pokemongo - Pokémon GO Subreddit.
  • /r/pokemongodev - Reverse engineering game/API.
  • /r/thesilphroad - Very indepth game discussion and such.
  • RazerGo - Localized Pokémon GO chat.
  • PokeDates - The first-ever Pokémon GO dating service.
  • The PokéCommunity - A dedicated forum to everything Pokémon.
  • Pokémon GO Raiders Discord - A Discord community for raid hosting and joining with discussions about Pokémon GO.

Official

Pokémon Pokémon GO Niantic
Website Website Website
YouTube YouTube YouTube
Twitter Twitter Twitter
Facebook Facebook Facebook
Instagram Instagram Instagram
TikTok TikTok TikTok

Maps

  • PokemonGo-Mapstars7.6k - Live visualization of all the Pokémon in your area and more.
  • PokemonGo-DesktopMapstars1.8k - Electron app for Pokémon GO that shows Pokémon nearby.
  • pokelocaterstars132 - Display Pokémon nearby your location on a map.
  • Pokemapstars1k - A native Android client to map the Pokémon around you.
  • Poke Vision - Find Pokémon by location.
  • iPokeGostars640 - A native iOS client to map the Pokémon around you.

Tips & Tricks

  • TechCrunch - 13 ways to be better at Pokémon GO.
  • Imore - Pokémon GO: 21 tips, tricks, and cheats to be the best trainer in the world.
  • Mashable - How to be the best, least annoying, Pokémon GO trainer.
  • Heavy - Pokémon GO: 10 Cheats, Tip & Tricks You Need to Know.

Wiki

  • Pokedexstars1.3k - More than you ever wanted to know about Pokémon.
  • Pokedex.orgstars2.3k - Offline-capable Pokédex web site https://pokedex.org.
  • Pokemon GO Wiki Guide by IGN
  • Pokémon GO Wiki
  • Pokémon GO Wikipedia
  • GamePress
  • Pokémon Go Info

Others

  • Silphroad - Pokémon GO tools & reference charts.
  • Server Status - Shows you if Pokémon GO is down.
  • Egg Statistics - Pokémon GO Egg Reporter.
  • Poke Assistant - Collection of calculators for Pokémon GO.
  • Calcy IV - One-tap stats and level calculation on Pokémon GO (Android).
  • InfoSpreadsheet - Datamined info about Pokémon GO species with IV calculations.
  • InfoSpreadsheet#2 - Pokémon GO species data with their movesets.
  • PVPoke - A PVP ranking and moveset for Pokémon GO.
  • Pokémon GO Calender - Pokémon GO calender events with Google Calendar and timezones support.
  • Poke Genie - A free raid hosting and joining app for iOS & Android with PVP functionalities.

License

To the extent possible under law, Tobias Bueschel has waived all copyright and related or neighboring rights to this work.
